title: Audit seat selection and enforce 5-seat cap

log.context: Audit seat selection and enforce 5-seat cap

Everything is done. Here's the full audit report:

**`MAX_DEBATERS`**: Was already set to `5` (line 20 of `congress_act.py`). No change needed.

**`congress_identities`**: The function makes a `GET /api/congress/identities` call and returns whatever the API gives back — it does not cap the result itself. It returns all candidates (active + severance) per the workflow comment.
